# ‘Shrinking’ the Odds: Why Harrison Ford’s Emmy Moment May Have Finally Arrived

*Source: Variety*

“Never tell me the odds!” What more does Harrison Ford have left to prove before the Television Academy finally calls his name on Emmy night? In “Shrinking,” the 83-year-old screen legend delivers some of his finest work as Dr. Paul Rhoades, a brilliant therapist grappling with the slow progression of Parkinson’s disease. articles.summary: *insert Godzilla screeching sound* Here's the very first look at the next big kaiju feature. Godzilla Minus Zero will continue the story of 2023's Godzilla Minus One, which returne
articles.learnerContent:
# Godzilla Minus Zero stomps through New York in first teaser trailer

*Source: The Verge*

*insert Godzilla screeching sound* Here's the very first look at the next big kaiju feature. Godzilla Minus Zero will continue the story of 2023's Godzilla Minus One , which returned the franchise to the more grounded tone established in the original film, and while the new teaser trailer doesn't show a whole lot, it suggests some big things for the series. Minus Zero is set in 1949, two years after the first movie, "and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity," according to the official logline. Apparently that includes shifting the setting from Tokyo to New York, as we see Godzilla right next to the St … Read the full story at The Verge.

---

articles.title: Help to Buy mostly helped high earners, IFS says
articles.summary: People with lower incomes benefitted less from the house-buying scheme than those with high incomes, the influential think tank says.
articles.learnerContent:
# Help to Buy mostly helped high earners, IFS says

*Source: BBC Business*

People with lower incomes benefitted less from the house-buying scheme than those with high incomes, the influential think tank says.
